parameters.query: SELECT p.model_name, p.model_version, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN p.correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS accuracy, ROUND(AVG(ABS(p.predicted_change - p.actual_change)), 4) AS mae, ROUND(SQRT(AVG(POWER(p.predicted_change - p.actual_change, 2))), 4) AS rmse, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN p.correct AND p.direction = 'bullish' THEN p.actual_change ELSE 0 END), 4) AS avg_correct_gain, MIN(p.evaluated_at) AS eval_start, MAX(p.evaluated_at) AS eval_end FROM ml_predictions p WHERE p.evaluated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND p.model_version IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.model_name, p.model_version ORDER BY p.model_name, accuracy DESC;
